rows.label: qev031203_MSG0001
rows.name:
It's okay, you don't have to be so scared.
No matter who comes, I'll protect you, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's fine.
I love that part of you, Leroy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hm...? Who are you?
We're a little busy right now, so...
I'd like you to go away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG1001
rows.name:
A Sapphire Single-Horn from a Lumedel
and a Ringstone...
If we have those, everything will go well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG1002
rows.name:
I'll even go show my face to my father,
so please bring them to me quickly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG2001
rows.name:
Once we're married, my father will have
no choice but to accept Leroy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG2002
rows.name:
Because a father who is soft on his daughter
could never cast me away once I'm married.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG2003
rows.name:
I feel bad about trapping him like this, but...
I believe the day will come when my father will accept Leroy
from the bottom of his heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG3001
rows.name:
I'm lonely not being able to be with Leroy, but...
I'm not anxious at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev031203_MSG3002
rows.name:
Leroy will absolutely come for me...
And he'll make me happy.[ST:wait ]
